description: User types 'web' into the Google search bar
frame_description: The search bar shows 'web' with suggestions appearing below.

description: User finishes typing 'webjet' into the Google search bar
frame_description: The search bar now contains 'webjet' and the suggestions have updated.

description: User clicks on the 'webjet' search suggestion, navigating to the Google search results page
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the first search suggestion before the page transitions to search results.

description: User hovers over the 'Askable Sessions' browser tab
frame_description: The cursor moves to the top of the browser window, highlighting the 'Askable Sessions' tab.

description: A tab preview tooltip appears for the 'Askable Sessions' tab
frame_description: A small popover window appears showing details for the hovered tab.
The tab preview popover is no longer visible on the screen.
